task_summary: ST2 remediation: fix unused openingAuthors parameter (W1 lint), extend shared qbStub with raw-query methods to unblock TC11 (W2), and add resolveTopicLastActivity primitive with isReply fallback for ST3 (W3).
acceptance_criteria: Topic items include lastPostAuthor (latest non-deleted reply author, or null when none)
Reusable primitive resolveTopicLastActivity provides the latest-reply-else-opening-post fallback with isReply flag, ready for ST3
lint, typecheck, and the API forums suite ALL pass (0 failures)
validation_commands: npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 --filter @sfus/api exec vitest run src/forums/forums.service.test.ts
validation_outcome: PASS — 150/150 tests pass; lint 0 warnings; typecheck 0 errors
test_location_guidance: apps/api/src/forums/forums.service.test.ts — existing ST2 tests; new behavioral coverage owned by Tester stage
implementation_context: W1/W3: Added TopicLastActivity interface to forums.types.ts with {author, at, isReply}. Added resolveTopicLastActivity method that runs the same single grouped query for latest non-deleted reply authors, then for topics with no reply falls back to openingAuthors map with isReply=false. The existing resolveTopicLastActivityAuthors delegates to this new method and maps isReply?author:null to preserve the null-for-no-reply contract that existing AC3 tests require. W2: Extended the shared qbStub in createMinimalRepository() with select/addSelect/innerJoin (chainable) and getRawMany (resolves to []) — fixes TC11 which calls listTopics with a real post-repo path through the new query builder chain.
